dominants.dominant_desc: В начале игре стоить как можно быстрее зачистить 1 волну крипов ,зарядить пассивка на максимум ,что позволить вам в начале долгое время доминировать на лайне ,запомните ,уранус нужен хороший уровень фарма ,у вас есть начальная стадия игры чтобы достичь этого ,а затем начинается время когда вам стоить взят на себя внимание всех врагов с середины и Лейт гейма

equips.equip_desc: Мой стиль снаряжения позволить быть более живучим в Лейт гейме и наносить больше урона с помощью 1 навыка ,есть ещё несколько вариаций каторые можно добавить по ситуации

hero.hero_overview: Уранус один из самых живущих среди танков ,и в начале игре обладает неплохим уроном от 1 навыка когда пассивка полностью заряжена ,хорош в начале и в средней стадии игры
hero.hero_strength: Благодарю своей пассивки может легко иницировать любой Файт при этом не боясь умереть, очень легко им контролироват некоторых тонких героев при правильном игре

data.title: Для тех кто хочет понять урануса

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Minotaur and Uranus is one of the best tank duos in the game. Uranus dives in and soaks all the damage while Minotaur follows up with his ultimate, stunning the entire enemy team in one spot. Both are incredibly hard to kill, so the enemy has to choose who to focus — and either way they lose. Minotaur's healing in rage mode also keeps Uranus alive even longer, making the combo almost impossible to deal with in team fights.

counters.counter_desc: Karrie — her passive deals true damage, which completely bypasses Uranus's defenses and regen. One of the hardest counters in the game against him.

dominants.dominant_desc: Uranus reaches his peak in the mid to late game once Oracle and Guardian Helmet are online. In team fights, walk straight into the enemy backline and force them to deal with you — the longer you stay alive, the more your team can clean up. Don't play passive. Your job is to be an annoying, unkillable presence that soaks all the damage while your carries do the work. Use Skill 2 to chase down fleeing enemies or close gaps, and pop your ultimate to cleanse slows when enemies try to kite you. The enemy team will either waste all their skills on you and die to your teammates, or ignore you and get destroyed. Either way, you win.
dominants.dominant_title: The Longer the Fight, the Worse for You

emblems.emblem_desc:
Emblem: Tank
Tank Emblem is the obvious choice for Uranus. Every single stat it provides directly benefits his playstyle — the extra Max HP makes him harder to burst down before his passive kicks in, the Physical and Magic Defense reduce incoming damage so his regen can outpace it, and the HP Regen stacks on top of his passive for even more sustain.
All Emblem gives Adaptive Attack which is completely wasted on Uranus — he has no business dealing damage, his job is to absorb it. There is no reason to run a damage stat on a hero whose entire identity is being unkillable.

equips.equip_desc:
Tough Boots — reduces CC duration, essential for a tank who needs to stay in fights and not get locked down.
Thunder Belt — after using a skill, your next basic attack slows the enemy and deals bonus HP-scaling damage. Perfect for Uranus since he has a massive HP pool, making every proc hit hard while also keeping enemies close.
Dominance Ice — reduces enemy HP regen and shields nearby, plus gives Physical Defense and slows attack speed. Directly counters sustain-heavy enemies and complements your own survivability.
Oracle — boosts all HP regen and shield absorption by 30%. This is his core item. It directly amplifies his passive regen, making him regenerate significantly more HP per stack. Must-buy every game.
Blade Armor — reflects a portion of Physical damage back at attackers. Since enemies are constantly hitting you, they take damage for doing so. Punishes physical-heavy lineups hard.
Guardian Helmet — grants massive HP regen based on max HP, which again synergizes directly with his passive. The more HP he has, the more he regens. Snowballs his sustain to ridiculous levels late game.
Every item in this build either increases his HP pool, boosts his regen, or punishes enemies for attacking him — which is exactly what Uranus wants.

hero.hero_overview: Uranus is a tanky roamer who becomes nearly unkillable the more he gets hit. His passive generates HP regeneration stacks with every instance of damage received — at max stacks, he can sustain through almost any burst. He excels at absorbing damage in team fights, initiating with his ultimate, and being an annoying frontline that never seems to die. The more the enemy focuses him, the harder he is to kill — making him a nightmare to deal with for damage-heavy compositions.

spell.spell_desc:
Spell: Vengeance
Uranus's updated ultimate no longer initiates — it cleanses slows and builds stacks. This shifts his entire playstyle toward pure sustain and survivability, which makes Vengeance a natural fit.
When enemies focus you, Vengeance reflects a portion of their damage back at them. Combined with your passive stacks and the slow cleanse from your ultimate, you become an absolute nightmare to kill — the harder they hit, the more they heal you and hurt themselves. It punishes enemies for doing exactly what they're supposed to do against a tank: burst you down.

data.title: Jungler Tricks

cooperates.cooperate_desc: - Amplify damage: Heroes like Vale or Eudora can burst down enemies that Uranus has weakened with his sustained damage.

counters.counter_desc: His passive reduces HP regen, which severely impacts Uranus's survivability.

dominants.dominant_desc:
- Lane Dominance: Play in the EXP lane and use your skills to clear minion waves quickly and harass your opponent. Your goal is to gain a level advantage.

- Sustain: Utilize Uranus's passive to sustain through poke damage from the enemy. Stay near minions to maintain your HP regeneration.

- Vision: Maintain vision in the lane to avoid ganks from the enemy jungler.

- Itemization: Start building your core items.

- Proxy Farming: After pushing lane, proxy farm by intercepting the next minion wave near the enemy's tower. Be mindful of ganks.

- Objective Control: Assist your team in securing objectives like Turtle or Towers. Use your tankiness to absorb damage while your teammates deal damage.

- Team Fights: Rotate to team fights and act as a frontline, absorbing damage and disrupting the enemy team. Focus on zoning out key enemy damage dealers.

- Split Pushing: If your team doesn't need you for team fights, split push to apply pressure on the enemy lanes. Be mindful of potential ganks and use your mobility to escape if needed.

- Map Awareness: Maintain map awareness to anticipate enemy movements and react accordingly. Rotate to help teammates in need or defend vulnerable towers.

- Item Completion: Finish building your core items to enhance Uranus's sustain and defensive capabilities.

- Team Fight Frontline: Position yourself as the primary frontline, absorbing damage and disrupting the enemy team. Protect your damage dealers by zoning out assassins or divers.

- Objective Control: Help secure objectives like the Lord and base turrets. Use your tankiness to withstand tower damage while your teammates push.

- Split Push Defense: If the enemy is split pushing, rotate to defend your base and prevent them from taking down your turrets.

- Map Awareness: Monitor the map to anticipate enemy movements and react accordingly.

- Peel for Carries: Focus on protecting your marksman or mage from assassins or divers. Use your skills to disrupt enemies attempting to target your carries.

- Strategic Positioning: Position yourself strategically to control key areas of the map and deny vision to the enemy team.

- Anti-Carry Focus: If possible, use Flicker or your ultimate to disrupt the enemy's carry, hindering their damage output in team fights.

- Item Adjustments: Adapt your item build based on the enemy's damage output. If they have high magic damage, build more magic resistance items. If they have high physical damage, build more physical defense items.

emblems.emblem_desc:
- Tank Stats: The Tank Emblem provides essential stats like HP, physical defense, and magic defense, increasing Uranus's durability.

- Concussive Blast: This talent adds extra damage and crowd control to Uranus's basic attacks, making him more effective at harassing enemies and disrupting their movements.

equips.equip_desc:
This build focuses on sustain, cooldown reduction, and defense, making Uranus incredibly durable and able to stay in fights longer. Key items boost his HP regen, mana, and provide physical/magic defense, helping him absorb damage and disrupt enemies.Core Build:
 
- Warrior Boots/Tough Boots: For physical or magical defense.

- Enchanted Talisman: For mana sustain and cooldown reduction.

- Oracle: To amplify healing and shield effects.

- Dominance Ice: Reduces enemy regen and attack speed.
 
Situational Items:
 
- Brute Force Breastplate: For extra mobility and damage.

- Immortality: For a second chance in team fights.

- Athena's Shield: To counter magic damage.

- Radiant Armor: To counter continuous magic damage.

- Queen's Wings: For damage reduction when low on HP.

hero.hero_overview: Uranus is a durable tank hero known for his high HP regeneration. He excels at prolonged fights, absorbing damage, and disrupting the enemy. His passive, Radiance, allows him to regenerate health each time he takes damage, making him hard to kill.
hero.hero_strength: Uranus excels at high sustain due to his passive HP regeneration, making him durable and dominant in lane. He provides a strong frontline in team fights and is easy for beginners to play.
hero.hero_weakness: Uranus is weak against heroes or items that reduce healing, and heroes with high burst damage who can kill him quickly. He also has limited crowd control and can be kited due to his low mobility and is item dependent.

data.recommend: High Rank And Low Rank Guide

spell.spell_desc: Increases healing received, synergizing well with Uranus's passive for even greater sustain.Use Revitalize before fights to boost your healing and regen, positioning yourself to share the effect with allies. Time it for maximum sustain during engagements, and combine it with healing items. Coordinate with your team and use it to secure objectives.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela provides shield upon using skill 3 and provides a constant large amount of movement speed and heal with skill 1. Skill 2 can also be used on an enemy hero to slow them down for greater stacking ability for Uranus's skill 1 dealing high magic damage with high mobility and sustainability.

As Yin uses Skill 3, yin brings the opponent to an arena only for himself and the enemy hero. This prevents Uranus from stacking skill 1 or taking damage from the enemy hero, causing all stacks to be gone in the process.

Estes provides an excessive amount of healing to heroes, giving Uranus and the team a huge advantage. Uranus can tank enemy's skills and damage continuously with the doubled healing effect of his passive and Estes's heavy healing skills.
Allowing Uranus to zone, vision and tank for the team without worries.

counters.counter_desc: Damage from Wanwan is not enough to kill Uranus even with skill 3 and inspire as Uranus's ability to tank and regenerate health is too great.

Dyrroth is a huge problem to Uranus in early game as Dyrroth can make use of his enhanced skill 2 to reduce 75% physical defence to a targeted hero. This gives Uranus a really tough earlygame as he cannot tank all the damage received by Dyrroth in early stages, especially Dyrroths's skill 3.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Level 1: Upgrade skill 1. Hit and run with skill 1 to minimize damage taken while increasing your stacks. Try to hit all minions and clear while stacking skill 1 on enemy to get level 2 faster, providing advantage in mobility/chase.

Passive: Basic attack creeps and let it hit you to increase stacks or take turret damage once awhile to maintain the 20 stacks on passive.

Skill 1 can stack even if you hit enemy with it last second.
(Can combo: skill1 with skill2 if enemy is out of skill1 range)

Laning: Try to cut lane and clear minion wave before the turtle/lord spawns to have faster rotation to turtle/lord area.

During turtle/lord teamfights: 
- Zone the surroundings of the turtle/lord to give team mates vision and give your team advantage.
- Poke enemy's backlines and damage dealers to distract them from turtle/lord.
- Cover your jungler and backlines when necessary.
Cut lanes and clear minion wave for faster rotation to teamfights to help invade enemy jungle or provide back up in midlane.

Upon entering a match as exp laner, help to deal damage to the buff for faster farm and rotation for your team jungler.
DO NOT: Steal creeps/buffs from jungler as they need to accumulate creep/buff kills for retribution level.

Tank a few turret damage for minions for longer minion duration in turret/base to have an endgame advantage.
(Damage dealt to turret/base is a lot more with minions in it's range).

emblems.emblem_desc: Common emblem provides great mana regeneration in early to mid game to keep using skills. Agility for better mobility. Tenacity for greater sustainability. Brave Smite to heal HP each time you deal skill damage to enemy heroes.

equips.equip_desc:
Tough boots: Reduce enemy's crowd control duration with slight magic defence.
Thunder Belt: Basic attack every 4s on enemy hero to gain 1 physical and magic defence each time(Increases sustainability permanently).
Dominance Ice: Reduces enemy's shield and HP regen and slows enemy's attack speed(more advantage in team fights).
Brute Force Breastplate: Extra damage,movement speed,control reduction.
Oracle: Increases HP regen and shield.
Antique Cuirass/Athena Shield/Radiant Armor: Extra defence.

hero.hero_overview: Uranus is a good sustainer in the exp lane, with the ability to regain health back continuously. A very good hero to zone away  enemies and give vision for team mates during turtle and lord fights, securing a level and gold advantage.
hero.hero_strength:
- Tank opponent's crowd control and damage skills.
- Continuous AOE magic burst damage (magic damage increases per 1st skill stack(hit) on enemy hero, up to 4 stacks).
- Constant health regeneration to full health (hp regen increases per stack, up to 20 stacks) (stack increases per damage taken).
hero.hero_weakness:
- Defence reduction (Example(heroes): Dyrroth (items): Dominance Ice, Glowing Wand, Sea Halberd).
- True damage (Example(heroes): Lesley, Karrie (items): War Axe, Starlium Scythe, Endless Battle).
-Physical/Magic penetration (items: Malefic Roar, Divine Glaive).
-HP based damage item: Wishing Lantern(Magic).

spell.spell_desc:
Vengeance: Reduces damage from enemy's attacks and reflects damage back to the attacker. Good for sustaining sudden burst damage, continuous basic attacks from damage dealers like Marksman role.
Sprint: Chase down backlines/ faster movement speed for reaching opponents to maintain 1st skill stacks (to deal continuous high burst damage to enemy heroes)/ Good for escaping teamfights when low.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kuat melawan fighter dan tank

counters.counter_desc: Lemah terhadap hero jarak jauh

dominants.dominant_desc: Tidak perlu takut, lakukan tarik ulur

emblems.emblem_desc: Uranus sangat kuat, tetapi kurang dalam damage. Build ini untuk menambah damage power uranus
Pilihan kedua jika ingin lebih seimbang bertahan dan menyerang

equips.equip_desc: Finishing
Bertahan dan menyerang yang seimbang

hero.hero_overview: Penguasaan line di awal sangat penting. Kuat dalam menyrang
hero.hero_strength: Saat early damage uranus sangat kuat, kuasai line. Rotasi ke mid atau ganggu jungler musuh
hero.hero_weakness: Kelemahannya adalah kurang kuat dalam bertahan, tetapi tdk berarti lemah. Bergabung dalam tim fight akan lebih baik saat memasuki late game

spell.spell_desc: Menyeimbangkan build damage uranus, karena lemah dalam bertahan
